assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: The response clearly separates Phase 2 (L4 Pool Upgrade) and Phase 3 (A100 Pool Upgrade) with different approaches - L4 pool is upgraded first as 'Lower Risk First' while A100 pool upgrade is coordinated with job completion

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: The response creates a new node pool rather than using surge upgrade parameters. It doesn't mention maxSurge settings for rolling replacement of the existing L4 pool

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: The response does not discuss GPU driver version compatibility issues or the need to ensure drivers work with inference frameworks like TensorRT or vLLM

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: The response explicitly recommends 'Wait for long-running fine-tuning jobs to complete' and includes coordination with ML teams to delay new fine-tuning jobs in the timing strategy

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: The response does not mention that GPU VMs don't support live migration or that inference pods will restart causing latency spikes during node upgrade

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: The response includes a specific PodDisruptionBudget example with minAvailable: 80% to ensure inference capacity is maintained during the upgrade

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: The response doesn't specifically address the issue that auto-scaler will create nodes at the old version during the upgrade process until the pool upgrade completes

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: The response includes a GPU functionality test post-upgrade but doesn't recommend testing driver and CUDA compatibility in staging before the production upgrade
